overview: Chain Monopoly is a digital multiplayer Monopoly game for 2-4 players with real-money ICP and ckBTC betting. Players stake crypto before the game, compete on a full 40-space board with all classic properties, and the last player standing wins the entire pot via on-chain escrow payout.
features: Full 40-space Monopoly board with all properties, railroads, and utilities
Real-money betting with ICP and ckBTC via on-chain escrow
Game lobby for 2-4 players with stake selection
Animated dice rolling and token movement
Property buying, rent collection, and bankruptcy detection
Internet Identity authentication with live wallet balance
Game event log for all moves
